Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter

  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:

Modified: head/www/p5-WebService-MoviePosterDB/Makefile
==============================================================================

+++ head/www/p5-WebService-MoviePosterDB/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:47:36 2014	(r350305)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org

 COMMENT=	Perl interface to MoviePosterDB
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1

+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Cache-Cache>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Cache-Cache \
 		p5-Class-Accessor>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-Accessor \
 		p5-JSON>=0:${PORTSDIR}/converters/p5-JSON \
